untranslatable_reason: Pattern identification (Broadening Wedges, Descending) requires visual/structural chart pattern recognition which cannot be expressed using only the available price and technical indicators. Volume trend analysis (Rising/Falling/U-shaped) also requires multi-bar pattern context not available in single-bar indicator values. Market regime classification (BULL_MARKET_UP_BREAKOUT vs BEAR_MARKET_DOWN_BREAKOUT) requires external regime detection beyond allowed operators. Success rate parameters and average performance metrics are author-silent and cannot be derived from indicators.
translation_notes: This signal requires: (1) chart pattern detection algorithm for broadening wedge identification, (2) volume profile analysis over pattern lifetime, (3) market regime classification logic. The entry condition uses volume increase as proxy for breakout confirmation, but this does not capture the geometric wedge pattern or volume trend shape analysis described in the source. Exit conditions use pivot reversal as proxy for AUTHOR_SILENT exit guidance. The direction is context-dependent based on breakout direction, which cannot be predetermined. Recommend implementing custom pattern recognition module separate from rules engine.
